source_title: 09 Shrine - Raya and the Last Dragon/10 Creating Fireflies with Niagara FX

evidences.content: 好了，现在我正在 Sequencer 中播放场景、 Alright, so now I'm playing the scene in Sequencer, 但老实说，我们的形象看起来还没有什么变化。 but if we're being honest, it doesn't really look like our image is moving yet. 以后我们还可以移动摄像机、 And we can move the camera later on, 但要在场景中增加运动感，我们可以做的最重要的事情就是添加尼亚加拉粒子。 but the big thing we can do to add movement into our scene is adding Niagara particles. 因此，在我们的参考资料中，我们可以看到他们拥有所有这些、 So looking at our reference here, we can see they have all of these, 我们称它们为背景中的萤火虫。 we'll call them fireflies in the background. 其实这些都是在树上拍摄的，但我认为这样可以让我们的示例照片更具动感、 These are actually on the trees, but I think to get a lot more movement out of our example shot, 我们将制作一些漩涡状的萤火虫在背景中移动、 we're gonna just create some swirling fireflies to move around in the background, 以及一些漂浮在周围的球体能量粒子效果，并被吸入中心的球体中。 and some orb energy particle effects that are floating around and get sucked into the orb in the center here. 这节课，我们将制作背景萤火虫。 So in this lesson, we're gonna build the background fireflies. 因此，让我们在 "资产 "文件夹中创建一个新资产、 So let's create a new asset in our Assets folder, 并新建一个名为 Fireflies 的文件夹、 and create a new folder called Fireflies, 在这里，我们将创建一个新的尼亚加拉系统。 and here we'll create a new Niagara system. 再次提醒大家，Niagara 系统在虚幻以前的所有版本中都是红色的、 Now again, as a reminder, Niagara systems are red in all of the previous versions of Unreal, 他们只是在虚幻 5.2 中将其改为了青色、 they just change it to cyan in Unreal 5.2, 但无论如何，我们都要建立一个新的尼亚加拉系统、 but regardless, we're gonna create a new Niagara system, 我们将从选定的发射器中创建一个新系统、 and we'll create a new system from selected emitters, 我们要从这里看看、 and we're gonna look through here and see, 是否有一个模板已经包含了我想要执行的粒子行为？ is there a template that already has the particle behavior of what I want to execute? 因此，它们会产生爆炸粒子，这并不是我们想要的、 So they have blowing particles, which isn't really what we want, 我们想要的是漩涡状的背景虫子，你知道，就是那种飘来飘去的东西。 we kind of want swirling background bugs, you know, something that's kind of floating around. 因此，悬挂微粒已经是一个不错的选择。 So there's hanging particulates, which is a pretty good option already. 所以，如果你按下绿色的加号按钮，就会把这个添加到我们的发射器中、 So if you press on the green plus button, that'll add this into our emitter, 然后把这个 NS 下划线称为 Fireflies 01。 and then let's call this NS underscore Fireflies 01. 这是我们的尼亚加拉系统，当我打开所有这些编辑器时，我喜欢做一件事、 And here is our Niagara system, and one thing I like to do when I have all of these editors open, 如果你同时打开了 5 个这样的文件，并且它们都在渲染、 if you have five of these open and they're all rendering at the same time, 会对机器造成很大的负担。 it can get really intensive on your machine. 因此，你实际上可以关闭视口，不让它们在每一帧都进行渲染 So you can actually turn off viewports and stop them from rendering every frame 在任何视口的汉堡包菜单中禁用此实时选项。 by disabling this real-time option in the hamburger menu of any viewport. 因此，快捷键是 Ctrl R、 So the shortcut there is Ctrl R, 但我发现有时快捷方式并不奏效、 but I find that sometimes the shortcut doesn't really work, 最好在这里取消选中，这对你的机器会有很大帮助。 and it's just better to go and uncheck here, but that'll really help your machine. 再给大家介绍一下尼亚加拉系统、 And just as a refresher on Niagara systems, 这里最重要的三个模块是发射器更新、 the three modules that are most important here are the emitter update, 我们要问自己的问题是： which the question we're going to ask ourselves is, 我们是想在粒子流中还是在爆发中产生这些粒子？ do we want to spawn these in a burst or in a flow of particles? 因此，在这种情况下，我们希望粒子流动起来、 So in this case, we want a flow of particles going, 我们只是想让萤火虫在背景中不断地进进出出、 we just want fireflies spawning constantly in and out in the background, 我们会让它们时隐时现。 we'll have them fade in and out. 在这里，我们可以初始化粒子的属性、 We have particle spawn, where we can initialize the properties of our particle, 比如使用寿命、颜色、大小和旋转、 like the lifetime, the color, the size, the rotation, 以及我们希望在哪里生成它们，通常是在形状位置。 and also where we want to spawn them, usually in a shape location. 然后是粒子更新，我们可以随时间改变粒子的行为。 And then we have particle update, where we can change the particle's behavior over time. 我们只有一个精灵渲染器，所以我们会有一些小卡片、 And we'll just have a sprite renderer, so we'll have little cards, 附着在每个粒子上的小精灵，它们始终面向摄像机、 little sprites that are attached to each particle that are always facing the camera, 但越往远处越小。 but they will get smaller going into the distance. 只是它们的旋转始终面向摄像头，所以它们总是完美的圆形。 Just their rotation will always be facing the camera, so they're always perfectly round. 因此，这个模板实际上会为我们做很多繁重的工作。 So this template is actually going to do a lot of the heavy lifting for us. 让我们把它拖到场景中，看看效果如何、 So let's just drag this into the scene and start to see the result, 以及我们如何才能使其更好或为我们的场景加以改进。 and how we can make it better or improve it for our scene. 当我在编辑器中预览时、 And when I'm previewing it in the editor, 还可以禁用 Niagara 编辑器的实时视口、 you can also disable the real-time viewport of your Niagara editor, 这样你就可以调整设置，但也能看到它在场景中的反应。 so that way you can just tweak the settings, but see how it reacts in your scene. 但同样，你只渲染了一个视口、 But again, you're only rendering one viewport, 所以一定要养成这样的习惯。 so definitely get in the habit of doing that. 随着时间的推移，它真的会有所帮助。 It's really going to help over time. 所以，我想做的第一件事就是把产卵率降低一点。 So the first thing I want to do is just reduce the spawn rate a little bit. 让我们把这个降到 30。 Let's go down to 30 for this. 这个模板有一个非常好的功能，那就是可以将颜色淡入淡出、 One really nice thing this template is doing is it's fading the color in and out, 以及该粒子的不透明度。 and actually the opacity of this particle. 因此，我们要使用 "比例颜色粒子更新 "模块。 So we're using the Scale Color Particle Update module. 如果你想添加一条淡入淡出的曲线、 And if you ever want to add a fade in and out curve, 如果我在 Scale Alpha 中从头开始做的话、 if I were just to do this from scratch in the Scale Alpha here, 我会直接从曲线输入浮动。 I would just type in float from curve. 你可以直接输入曲线，然后它就会搜索这个。 You can just type in curve, and then it'll search for this. 然后它会给你一个时间表。 And then it will give you a timeline. 这里有一些模板，可以淡入淡出 And there are these templates here where you can fade in and out 并有这些预设曲线。 and have these preset curves. 因此，你也可以为精灵大小做这样的处理，这也是在做这件事。 So you can do this for the sprite size, which this is also doing. 然后，你可以在 0 和 1 之间改变这些曲线，以改变随时间变化的强度。 And then you can change these curves between 0 and 1 to change the intensity over time. 然后将这条曲线乘以比例曲线变量。 And then you can multiply this curve by this scale curve variable. 所以，如果我想让它大五倍，但我还是喜欢这里的曲线、 So if I wanted this to be five times larger, but I still like the curve here, 可以乘以 5。 you can multiply it by five. 这非常适合在需要增大烟雾颗粒的地方制造烟雾颗粒。 This is great for creating smoke particles where they need to be bigger over time. 这是一个非常有用的概念，你会经常用到。 That's a really helpful concept there that you'll use all the time. 因此，我们可以将产卵率降低到 15。 So we can reduce the spawn rate down to 15. 事实上，我对它的表现非常满意。 I'm actually pretty happy with the behavior of this. 但如果我们想增加一点运动和动荡、 But if we wanted to add a little bit more movement and turbulence, 我们可以添加 "卷曲噪声力"。 we could add a Curl Noise Force. 现在，这是你真正要玩的东西。 Now, this is something you really have to play with. 有时，极端的数值在这里也很有效。 Sometimes really extreme values work well here. 因此，可以尝试非常小的数值或非常大的数值。 So try out really small values or really high values. 通过增加高噪声强度，可以真正开始改变行为 This can really start to change the behavior by adding in high noise strength 低频率和高频率，以及高频率和高强度。 and low frequency and also high frequency and high strength. 另一个有用的技巧是加大力度。 Another useful technique is to go really high on the strength. 因此，我打算疯狂地使用 1 500 这样的噪音强度。 So I'm going to go crazy with something like 1,500 for the noise strength. 显然，他们会非常好动。 Obviously, they're going to be really hyperactive. 但有一件事你可以做，那就是在之后添加一个拖动模块。 But one thing you can do is you can add a Drag Module afterwards. 这样，粒子仍然可以传播很远的距离，而且移动速度更快 That way, particles can still travel a long distance and move faster 而不会感到紧张不安。 without feeling as jittery. 拖动可以减少你可能看到的抖动。 Drag can help reduce that jitteriness that you might see. 但这完全取决于你。 But that one's totally up to you. 然后，我们还可以在这里更改颜色。 And then we can also change the color here. 现在，这有点奇怪和令人困惑。 Now, this is a little bit weird and confusing. 这里有一个 Scale RGB 输入，如果你在这里读过的话、 There's this Scale RGB input, which if you read here, 它寻找的是矢量类型的数据。 it's looking for a vector type of data. 因此，这个 XYZ 其实就是 RGB。 So this XYZ is really RGB. 因此，如果我把 X 从 1 改为 5，红色就会多很多 And so if I changed X from 1 to 5, this would be a lot more red 突然之间 all of a sudden. 但如果我们的数值大于 1、 But if we're going into values that are higher than 1, 这些都会变成辐射状，变得非常非常明亮、 these are going to become emissive and become really, really bright, 这可能是你不想要的。 which you might not want. 所以，如果我想让它更红一些、 So if I wanted this to be a lot more red, 但我不想增加数值，而不是将红色增加到 5、 but I don't want to increase the value, instead of increasing the red to 5, 我会把红色保持在 1，减少 G 和 B。 I would keep red at 1, and I would reduce G and B. 因此，我会反其道而行之，将红色保持在 1、 So I would do the opposite, where if I keep red to 1, 但我将绿色和蓝色设置为 0.1，现在我的粒子是红色的、 but I keep green and blue set to 0.1, now my particles are red, 但它们并不更亮。 but they aren't brighter. 现在，这可能有点让人摸不着头脑、 Now, this can be a little bit confusing to wrap your head around, 因为如果我想创造一种紫色的话、 because if I wanted to create a purple color, 但我有红色、绿色和蓝色，数字颜色有两面性。 but I have red, green, and blue, there's two sides to the digital color. 您可以使用 RGB，然后在 Photoshop 中打印、 You have RGB, and then when printing in Photoshop, 您可能听说过 CMYK。 you might have heard of CMYK. 它与 RGB 相反。 It's the reverse of RGB. 因此，红色的反义词是青色，绿色的反义词是品红色、 So the opposite of red is cyan, the opposite of green is magenta, 而蓝色的反义词是黄色。 and the opposite of blue is yellow. 所以，如果我们想要紫色或洋红色、 So if we wanted to go purple or magenta, 我们想保持同样的颜色、 and we wanted to stay the same color, 我们希望减少绿色，增加洋红色。 we would want to reduce our green to go more magenta. 因此，将绿色作为一个非常低的值、 So by making green a really low value, 比如 0.05 或 0.01、 like something really close to 0, like 0.05 or 0.01, 这样就能与树木形成很好的色彩对比。 that can give us some really nice color contrast against the trees. 所以，如果你是那种想更多了解尼亚加拉的人、 So if you're the type of person who wants to learn more about Niagara, 我会不断尝试不同的粒子更新节点、 I would keep messing with different particle update nodes, 并尝试一些不同的力量、 and try out some different forces, 看看他们在做什么，你可以如何改变他们的行为。 and see what they do, how you can change the behavior. 但我认为目前这样做肯定是好的。 But I think this is definitely good for now. 我们还可以做最后一件事，就是让你们知道它就在这里、 One last thing that we could do, just so you know that it's here, 我们可以添加另一种类型的呈现器。 we could add another type of renderer. 现在，我们有一个正对摄像头的精灵。 So right now we have this sprite that is facing camera. 这就是这里发生的主要事情。 That's the main things that are going on here. 但我们也可以添加一个灯光渲染器、 But we could also add a light renderer, 现在每个粒子都能变成光。 and now every particle can turn into a light. 因此，在添加灯光渲染器时 So when you add a light renderer, 有时，你真的必须使用这种颜色添加选项。 sometimes you really have to crank this color add option. 这是您添加到场景中的光量。 This is the amount of light you're adding into the scene. 我认为更合理的数值可能是 500 I think a more reasonable value here would probably be 500 在红色和蓝色通道中。 in the red and blue channel. 同样，这也是因为你想减少绿化。 And again, that's because you want to reduce the green 以获得洋红色。 to get the magenta color. 这完全取决于口味。 Now this is totally to taste. 这些颜色仍然很亮，所以可以尝试一下。 These are still pretty bright, so play around with this. 最后，什么才是最酷的组合呢？ In the end, what would be a cool combination 就是让这些东西发出一些光、 is having these emit some light, 但我们也可以在背景中设置一些紫色灯光 but we can also set up some purple lights in the background 只是为了突出它，并营造出一些很酷的照明效果 just to accentuate it and create some cool under lighting 树上。 on the trees. 在这个灯光渲染器下，你还需要检查一件事 And one other thing you want to check under this light renderer 是要检查亮度的阿尔法比例。 is you want to check alpha scales of brightness. 这种设置方式就是我们的比例颜色模块、 The way this is set up, our scale color module, 阿尔法正在逐渐消失、 the alpha is fading in and out, 这就是控制精灵褪色的原因。 and that's what's controlling the fading of the sprites. 因此，在灯光渲染器中，我们需要检查以下内容 So in our light renderer, we need to check this 来告诉它我们要获取该 alpha 通道 to tell it that we want to take that alpha channel 并乘以颜色。 and multiply it by the color. 否则，我们的灯就会忽明忽暗。 Otherwise, our lights will just pop in and out. 现在，我们要对所有粒子进行最后一步处理 Now the last step we have to do with all of our particle 在将虚幻技术用于 VFX 时，您可以使用这些系统、 systems when using Unreal for VFX, 您需要查看发射器顶部的属性 you want to go to the properties at the top of this emitter 并开启决定论。 and turn determinism on. 如果我们想每次都得到同样的结果、 And if we wanted to get the same result every single time, 我们将把它添加到我们的序列中。 we would add this into our sequence here. 我们将在 Sequencer 中添加一个新的 Niagara 组件轨道 We would add a new Niagara component track in Sequencer 然后创建一个尼亚加拉系统 for this Niagara system, and then create a Niagara system 生命周期轨道。 lifecycle track. 然后点击右键，进入属性、 And then you right click this, go to properties, 和年龄更新模式。 and age update mode. 我们会将其改为理想年龄。 We would change this to desired age. 现在我们可以刷新时间线了、 And now we can scrub our timeline, 而且每次都会保持一致。 and it's going to be consistent every time. 因此，在这种情况下，你可能会希望它在稍后才产生。 So in this case, you'd probably want to have it spawn later on. 但这样一来，你就可以 But this way, you could just pick out 你喜欢的行为的某个部分、 a certain part of the behavior that you like, 然后你每次都会得到同样的结果。 and then you'll get the same result every single time. 从这里开始，我将进入尼亚加拉系统内部 And from here, I'm just going to take the Niagara system inside 的序列器，并在选中时复制该序列器、 of Sequencer and duplicate that while it's selected, 并按 "是"。 and press yes. 然后，我们还建立了这个新系统。 And then we have this new system that's also set up. 另一件有用的事情是，如果我们 And another thing that's useful, if we 回到我们的尼亚加拉系统，在我们的财产中、 go back to our Niagara system, in our properties, 如果我们将这个发射器设置为本地空间，然后按下保存、 if we set this emitter to local space, and I press Save, 现在当我旋转这个粒子系统时 now when I rotate this particle system, 它将作为单一资产移动。 it'll move as a singular asset. 因此，您可以精确地 So you can really fine tune exactly 我们想把它放在哪里，它会继续 where we want to place this, and it'll continue 的动画效果。 to animate as you'd want it. 但在这种情况下，我们可以移动时间轴、 But in this case, we could move the timeline, 也许还可以试着找一个有趣的形状 and maybe try to find an interesting shape 然后在构图中加以运用。 that they create, and then use that in the composition. 如果我们再重复一次，还能得到额外的分数 And for bonus points, if we duplicate this one more time 并将其移至前景，我 and move it into the foreground, I 发现当 find it always just makes a better image when 在前景和中景中都有这样的元素、 you have elements like these in the foreground, midground, 和背景，以增加拍摄的深度。 and background, just to help with the depth of your shot. 所以，如果我们能在边上加一个这样的装置、 So if we can add one of these just off into the side, 我们还可以为此添加一个转换轨道。 we can also add a transform track to this. 这样就很容易在屏幕外拖动这些东西。 That can make it easy to drag these around off screen. 这真的很酷，因为我们可以 And it's really cool, because we can just 实时播放，我们将 play this in real time, and we're 比如动态刷新这些元素 like scrubbing these elements dynamically 直到我们得到满意的结果。 until we have something that we're happy with. 你还可以将其旋转。 And you could also rotate this around. 如果我们不喜欢这样，我们可以 And if we don't like that, we could just 在以后的时间里，将这一点进一步延伸、 move the time later on, extend this out even further, 直到我们找到某种粒子 and just keep going until we find some sort of particle 我们满意的动画 animation that we're happy with. 但现在，我们可以真正开始把它当作视频剪辑来处理了、 But now we can really start to treat this like a video clip, 只不过它是一个实时运行的粒子系统、 except it is a particle system that all works in real time, 尤其是在移动摄像机时、 especially when you're moving the camera around, 或诸如此类的东西，我们有一个粒子，它有一种 or things like that, where we have a particle that kind of 夹子穿过地板。 clips through the floor. 我们可以说，好吧，我们可以稍后再擦、 We could be like, OK, well, we can just scrub that later, 因为我们知道这行不通、 because we know that's not going to work, 或把它移到更高的位置，这样它就不会 or move it higher up so that it doesn't 夹穿地板，诸如此类。 clip through the floor, things like that. 就这样吧。 So there we go. 我们只有几张前景和中景的照片 We just have a couple that are in the foreground and midground 增加一个额外的粒子系统。 by adding that one extra particle system. 因此，我认为这个元素目前还不错。 So I think that element is good for now. 下面我们来看看球体的粒子。 Let's move on to the particles of the orb.
